title: Youth Integrated Team (YIT)
text:
Youth Integrated Team (YIT) - SupportGoWhere
Youth Integrated Team (YIT)
Share link
Provides community-based mental health assessment, therapeutic intervention, case management for youths with mild mental health conditions while monitoring and checking in with the youth before, during and after intervention has been provided.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Free
Referral required
Collapse all sections
About this support

You can approach over 100 community mental health teams in the community islandwide such as YIT, providing the following support:

 Provide mental health assessments and support youths in understanding and identifying their care needs.

Provide coordinated person-centric care intervention and support for youths and their caregivers through providing assessments, therapeutic intervention and case management.

Engage community and healthcare partners to build a supportive environment for youths with mental health conditions through active collaboration and co-management of cases.

Facilitate the formation of supportive relationships with families and peers in the recovery journey of youths.

 

These community mental health teams are developed under the Community Mental Health Masterplan driven by the Agency for Integrated Care (AIC), together with the Ministry of Health (MOH). The teams are fully funded by the government and there is no out-of-pocket cost.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident

Youths at higher risk for mental health conditions, their families and their support systems.

Aged 12 to 25 years old

What to expect?

Applicants may need to fulfil the services’ in-take criteria and providers’ service boundaries, if any.

How to apply?

Call or email the providers to make an appointment. Visit AIC’s website to search for service providers by postal code, address or your device’s current location.

If you are already seeing a General Practitioner (GP) or Polyclinic doctor, you may approach them for support.

Information last updated on 23 Feb 2026
